prose:
Frontier-orbital analysis of TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl) computed as a single-point unrestricted Kohn–Sham DFT (UKS) calculation at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier 'standard') using PySCF, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet, appropriate for TEMPO's stable nitroxide radical). Exact four-centre two-electron integrals were used (density fitting OFF). Geometry taken directly from the user-supplied .xyz file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz) without re-optimisation at this level. SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Key results:
  HOMO   (index 86): −6.3375439 eV
  LUMO   (index 87): −2.4651235 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:      3.8724203 eV  ← headline value (Koopmans orbital gap, not a vertical excitation energy)
  Total energy:      −483.88366 Hartree (−13167.145 eV)

Koopmans descriptors:
  Vertical IP  = 6.3375439 eV
  Vertical EA  = 2.4651235 eV
  Electronegativity χ     = 4.4013337 eV
  Chemical hardness η     = 1.9362102 eV
  Chemical softness S     = 0.51647286 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity index ω = 5.0024886 eV
